title: CMS INDUSLAW advises IREDA on sanctioning ₹200 crore for Uttar Pradesh solar project
description: Indian Renewable Energy Development Agency Limited (IREDA) has sanctioned a term loan facility of ₹200 crores to a prominent renewable energy developer to part-finance the development and implementation of a 65.7 MW Solar Photovoltaic Power Project set up across 11 locations in Uttar Pradesh.CMS INDUSLAW advised IREDA on structuring, negotiation, and execution of financing documents for a term loan facility. The Firm conducted title due diligence of project lands spread across the 11 project loc
